questions.question: Which of the following alkyl halides undergoes SN1 reaction most rapidly under identical conditions? (Solvent: aqueous ethanol, 36°C)
questions.hint: SN1 mechanisms proceed via carbocation intermediates. The more stable the carbocation, the faster the reaction.
questions.solution: SN1 rate depends on carbocation stability (3° > 2° > 1°). Option A forms a highly stable tertiary carbocation.

questions.question: What is the absolute configuration of (S)-2-chlorobutane?

options.A: Priority: Cl > C2H5 > CH3 > H; counter-clockwise
